name: stunfisk
flavor_text: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.

moves.name: tackle
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: water-gun
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: thunder-shock
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: mud-slap
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: mud-sport
moves.effect: Halves all Electric-type damage.

moves.name: bide
moves.effect: User waits for two turns, then hits back for twice the damage it took.

moves.name: camouflage
moves.effect: User’s type changes to match the terrain.

moves.name: charge
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage.  User’s Electric moves have doubled power next turn.

moves.name: mud-bomb
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: sucker-punch
moves.effect: Only works if the target is about to use a damaging move.

moves.name: discharge
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: flail
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

moves.name: fissure
moves.effect: Causes a one-hit KO.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

moves.name: bounce
moves.effect: User bounces high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.

moves.name: bulldoze
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: dig
moves.effect: User digs underground, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: earth-power
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: earthquake
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dig users.

moves.name: eerie-impulse
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: electric-terrain
moves.effect: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.

moves.name: electroweb
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: flash
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: foul-play
moves.effect: Calculates damage with the target’s attacking stat.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: infestation
moves.effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.

moves.name: mud-shot
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: muddy-water
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: payback
moves.effect: Power is doubled if the target has already moved this turn.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: revenge
moves.effect: Inflicts double damage if the user takes damage before attacking this turn.

moves.name: rock-slide
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: rock-tomb
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: sandstorm
moves.effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.

moves.name: scald
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: secret-power
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to inflict a status effect which depends upon the terrain.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: sludge-bomb
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: sludge-wave
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: stealth-rock
moves.effect: Causes damage when opposing Pokémon switch in.

moves.name: stomping-tantrum
moves.effect: Has double power if the user’s last move failed.

moves.name: stone-edge
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: surf
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dive users.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: thunder
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: uproar
moves.effect: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.

moves.name: astonish
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: curse
moves.effect: Ghosts pay half their max HP to hurt the target every turn.  Others decrease Speed but raise Attack and Defense.

moves.name: me-first
moves.effect: Uses the target’s move against it before it attacks, with power increased by half.

moves.name: pain-split
moves.effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.

moves.name: reflect-type
moves.effect: User becomes the target’s type.

moves.name: spark
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: spite
moves.effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.

moves.name: yawn
moves.effect: Target sleeps at the end of the next turn.

moves.name: aqua-tail
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: endeavor
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.

moves.name: lash-out
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: magnet-rise
moves.effect: User is immune to Ground moves and effects for five turns.

moves.name: shock-wave
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: water-pulse
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

abilitiesDetailed.name: static
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilitiesDetailed.name: sand-veil
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Increases evasion to 1.25× during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
